revisedPrompt:
Create a polished production-ready 2D side-scrolling game background asset for “EX-0007 round three: refuge descent,” using the supplied images only as broad visual guidance for line quality and palette—not copying any characters, compositions, objects, or distinctive designs. Very wide panoramic side-profile landscape, ideally 21:9. Original whimsical children’s adventure world with crisp hand-drawn dark blue-gray contours, flat pastel fills, subtle charming organic imperfections, and clean readable silhouettes.

Scene: warm late-afternoon mountain descent beneath an open pale-aqua sky. Layered rounded hills slope gently downward across the panorama, with soft atmospheric depth. A small welcoming mountain refuge sits far in the background, modest and storybook-like, with one warm glowing yellow window and a coral-tinged roof or trim. Include only sparse decorative scenery: a few simple blank fabric banners with absolutely no symbols, scattered shrubs, tiny flowers, and restrained leaf-green foliage. Balance warm yellow and coral sunlight accents against fresh leaf green and cool pale aqua. Soft long-light feeling, but retain flat graphic fills rather than painterly rendering.

Critical gameplay composition: keep the entire middle horizontal band open, uncluttered, low-detail, and visually calm for later overlays of a runner, a flying rival, and modular numbered ground. Do not place hills, buildings, trees, banners, shrubs, flowers, or other high-contrast details through this central gameplay corridor; scenery should frame it mostly above and below or remain distant and low contrast. Keep all important scenic landmarks within the center 60% of the image vertically, so both an ultra-wide desktop crop and a narrower mobile crop remain coherent. Favor crop-safe composition with the refuge and main hill rhythm away from extreme edges.

Background scenery only. Absolutely no foreground playable platform, no ground blocks, no cutaway soil tiles, no holes, no characters, no animals, no birds, no glider, no race markers, no signs, no text, no letters, no numbers, no interface, no logos, no watermark, no branding. No magenta sheet background. Deliver as a single seamless-feeling wide background illustration.
prompt: Create the production background asset for EX-0007 round three, the refuge descent, as part of the complete visual redesign requested by the user. Wide side-profile landscape in warm late-afternoon light: open pale aqua sky, descending rounded hills, a welcoming small mountain refuge with a glowing window far in the background, a few banners without symbols, shrubs and flowers, with warm yellow and coral light balanced by leaf green. Keep the entire middle horizontal band open and low-detail so the interactive runner, flying rival, and modular numbered ground will be overlaid there. Compose all important scenery inside the center 60% vertically so a very wide desktop crop and a narrower mobile crop both remain coherent. Background scenery only: no foreground playable platform, no ground blocks, no holes, no characters, glider, race markers, text, numbers, interface, logos, watermark, or branding.
